findings.description: Module-level autouse=True fixtures ran for all tests including those that didn't need mocking. Scoped to class-level _apply_mocks pattern.
findings.proposedRule: autouse=True fixtures MUST be scoped to narrowest applicable level (class > module > session)

findings.description: pytest.raises(Exception) caught wrong exception types silently. Contract tests passed even when compiler raised TypeError instead of CompilationException.
findings.proposedRule: pytest.raises() MUST specify exact exception type with attribute assertions

findings.description: AlertChannelPlugin caused circular imports requiring TYPE_CHECKING guards, __init__.py exclusion, and documented comments.
findings.proposedRule: Plugin ABCs with bidirectional imports use TYPE_CHECKING + exclusion + comment pattern

findings.description: run_enforce_stage() accepted token/principal without validation, relying on caller behavior. Gate-security flagged this.
findings.proposedRule: Security-sensitive parameters MUST be validated at function boundary regardless of caller trust

findings.description: 27 findings required structured cleanup plan grouped by commit scope. Ad-hoc fixing would have been error-prone.
findings.proposedRule: When >5 WARN findings, create structured cleanup plan before fixing

findings.description: run_enforce_stage only importable via deep path while compile_pipeline had convenience re-export. Asymmetric API surface.
findings.proposedRule: Public API functions MUST be re-exported from package __init__.py
